channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: LeBron James becomes first professional male athlete to have likeness depicted in a Ken doll
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Basketball great LeBron James has become the first professional male athlete to have his likeness depicted in a Ken doll. Mattel Inc. unveiled the LeBron Ken doll on Wednesday to kick off the toy manufacturer's “Kenbassador” series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pedro Martinez says he has family members unaccounted for in Dominican nightclub roof collapse
item.description: Dominican-born Hall of Fame pitcher Pedro Martinez said Wednesday he has family members unaccounted for who were inside the Santo Domingo nightclub when its roof collapsed. The 53-year-old Martinez was born in Manoguayabo, about 10 miles west of the Dominican Republic's capital city.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic expects a lot of emotions for him and Mavs fans in his return to Dallas with Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic knows there will be a lot of emotions when he steps on the court in Dallas for the first time wearing his No. 77 jersey for the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Villanova welcomes Basketball Head Coach Kevin Willard
item.description: (WPHL) -- Villanova University has officially welcomed its new Men's Basketball Head Coach. Kevin Willard was named the William B. Finneran Endowed Head Men's Basketball Coach at Villanova University in March 2025.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, PHL 17

item.title: Tickets available for Penn State baseball game at Pittsburgh Pirates' park
item.description: PITTSBURGH, Pa. (WHTM) - Tickets are available to watch Penn State baseball play at the home of the Pittsburgh Pirates. The Nittany Lions will face the Pitt Panthers on Tuesday, May 13, at PNC Park, the fifth time Penn State has played at the Pirates' ballpark. The first pitch is scheduled for 6 p.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: France's Dominique Malonga among players to watch during WNBA draft after Paige Bueckers goes No. 1
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paige Bueckers is clearly the best-known player in Monday's WNBA draft, but Dominique Malonga of France is among the most interesting. Curiosity around the 6-foot-6 forward seems to be growing.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor and Serrano to headline again at Madison Square Garden. This time, all the fighters are women
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano fought three years ago at Madison Square Garden, it did more than open a thrilling rivalry between two of boxing's best. It opened doors for women's boxers that neither could have imagined were ever available.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tarik Skubal says he's glad the keyhole at Comerica Park is gone after Tigers asked for input
item.description: The Detroit Tigers are wrapping up their first homestand with a subtle change on the field at Comerica Park, putting grass over a strip of dirt that used to be between the pitcher’s mound and batter’s box.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Buddy Hield entering rare company as Warriors’ iron man
item.description: Warriors guard Buddy Hield’s historic durability a product of work ethic that has helped him improve basketball in his native Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: ASU golf coach removed from Augusta National for violating long-standing dress code rule
item.description: ASU golf coach Matt Thurmond was removed from the grounds of Augusta National this week after he mistakenly violated the strict dress code policy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Grizzlies' Jaylen Wells breaks his wrist on hard landing that sent rookie to the hospital
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Memphis starting guard Jaylen Wells broke his right wrist on a hard fall on his arm and head from a midair collision at the end of a fast-break dunk during a victory over Charlotte on Tuesday, likely ending the rookie's season right before the Grizzlies go into the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: RICHARD WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canucks make NHL history with 3 goals in last minute of regulation, beat Stars 6-5 in OT
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Kiefer Sherwood set an NHL record three weeks ago by accumulating the most hits in a season. He helped the Vancouver Cancuks made history on Tuesday night with a big comeback in the final minute of regulation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mariners' Victor Robles fractures shoulder after slamming into wall during highlight-reel catch
item.description: Mariners center fielder Victor Robles appears to be on the mend after he suffered a left shoulder injury during a game against the Giants on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy, still vying for first Masters title, wants to 'block out the noise' at Augusta
item.description: Rory McIlroy knows the conversation surrounding him as he heads into his 17th Masters Tournament, but the 35-year-old is "trying to block out the noise.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scheffler is back to defend his Masters title, if he can make it through the Champions Dinner safely
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The prerogative of choosing the menu for the Champions Dinner at the Masters falls upon the defending champion, and Scottie Scheffler made an addition in his second go-around at those selections that underscored his wry sense of humor. His dad used to make wonderful meatballs.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump administration visa policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, WGN 9

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Northwestern University to settle lawsuit over football program hazing allegations
item.description: Northwestern University has agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by students against the school and former head coach Pat Fitzgerald, who alleged hazing incidents took place in the football program, but the settlement does not resolve Fitzgerald's lawsuit against the university.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Johnny Gaudreau's wife Meredith announces birth of couple's third child
item.description: Johnny and his brother were killed in New Jersey when they were riding bicycles and struck from behind by a suspected drunk driver.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin has broken Wayne Gretzky’s record for the most goals in NHL history by scoring the 895th of his career. The Washington Capitals’ captain made history Sunday against the New York Islanders by beating fellow Russian Ilya Sorokin on a power play in the second period.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, Fox 5
